library_versions.reasoning: LTS. Chatbox requires >=20 <23. System has 22.22.2 via /opt/homebrew/opt/node@22.
Latest stable TS 5.x. Chatbox codebase compatible.
Latest Fastify 5.x. Auto-OpenAPI, schema validation, TypeScript native.
Auto-generates OpenAPI 3.1 from Fastify route schemas. Satisfies L-001.
Serves Swagger UI at /docs.
WebSocket support for Fastify. Based on ws library.
Redis-backed rate limiting per route.
CORS middleware.
Latest Prisma 6.x. Type-safe ORM with migrations. RLS via $executeRaw.
Prisma client matching engine version.
Best Node.js Redis client. Pub/Sub, cluster, auto-reconnect.
Vercel AI SDK. Use version from Chatbox's package.json — do NOT upgrade.
Anthropic provider for Vercel AI SDK. Use version from Chatbox.
Direct Anthropic SDK for server-side when AI SDK abstraction insufficient.
Runtime validation. Shared between frontend and backend. Use version from Chatbox.
LTI 1.3 Advantage Node.js library. SSO, AGS, NRPS.
JWT issuance and verification.
Chess logic, legal move validation, FEN/PGN support.
TypeScript SDK for Langfuse. Self-hosted.
Fastify default logger. Structured JSON logging.
Vite-native testing. Same ecosystem as Chatbox.
E2E testing. Supports Electron for desktop, Chromium for web.
Already used by Chatbox. Workspace support for monorepo.

required_patterns: REQUIRED: Use Fastify route schemas (Zod compiled to JSON Schema) for all endpoints — auto-generates OpenAPI
REQUIRED: /docs (Swagger UI) and /openapi.json MUST remain enabled in all environments (L-001)
REQUIRED: Health endpoint reports product capability status, not just infra connectivity (L-002)
REQUIRED: All Zod schemas in @chatbridge/shared package — imported by both frontend and backend
REQUIRED: Prisma middleware for RLS: $executeRaw(`SET LOCAL app.tenant_id = $1`, [tenantId]) per transaction
REQUIRED: Never use SET (session-scoped) for RLS — always SET LOCAL (transaction-scoped)
REQUIRED: WebSocket auth via query param ?token=<jwt> — browsers cannot set headers on WS upgrade
REQUIRED: All postMessage origins validated against allowlist before processing
REQUIRED: CBP messages validated against Zod schema before JSON-RPC processing
REQUIRED: Message size checked (64KB limit) BEFORE JSON.parse to prevent DoS
REQUIRED: PII stripped from all outbound CBP payloads before reaching iframe apps
REQUIRED: Crisis detection ALWAYS runs regardless of prior safety stage results
REQUIRED: All LLM calls traced in Langfuse with pseudonymous user IDs — NO PII in traces
REQUIRED: Never block user-facing requests on Langfuse failures — log locally, replay later
REQUIRED: Anthropic API calls include inference_geo='us' for COPPA data residency
REQUIRED: OAuth2 via popup window (not redirect) — redirect breaks iframe sandbox
REQUIRED: OAuth tokens encrypted at rest (AES-256-GCM with OAUTH_ENCRYPTION_KEY env var)
REQUIRED: Audit events are append-only — no UPDATE or DELETE on audit_events table
REQUIRED: TDD mandatory — tests written FIRST, confirm red, implement, confirm green (L-077)
REQUIRED: No mocking PostgreSQL or Redis — use docker-compose for real instances (L-079)
REQUIRED: Full test suite regression run after every wave of parallel tasks (L-078)
REQUIRED: iframe sandbox='allow-scripts' only — NEVER allow-same-origin on untrusted apps
REQUIRED: Single active app constraint — new invocation suspends current app (CLR-005)
REQUIRED: Conservative tool routing — AI only invokes on clear explicit intent (CLR-004)
banned_patterns: BANNED: SET (session-scoped) for RLS tenant context — use SET LOCAL only
BANNED: Mocking PostgreSQL or Redis in tests — use real instances via docker-compose
BANNED: allow-same-origin on untrusted iframe sandboxes
BANNED: Direct iframe-to-LLM communication — all routes through backend
BANNED: PII in Langfuse traces (student names, emails, addresses)
BANNED: API keys or secrets in source code or committed files
BANNED: Synchronous Langfuse calls in request path
BANNED: Non-US inference for student data (no inference_geo omission)
BANNED: Password storage (all auth via SSO/LTI/OAuth)
BANNED: Auto-dismiss for critical safety alerts
BANNED: Writing tests after implementation — tests must be written first (L-077)
BANNED: Deferring observability/guardrails/eval to CP-5 — these are CP-1/CP-2 infrastructure (L-070)

docker_compose.note: All integration tests run against these real services. No mocks.
